title: Soul Lamp (from Ancient Trinkets mod)
description: Takes the soul lamp trinket and changes it up a bit, making it a stand alone mod.
body:
# What is this mod?
This mod adds the **Soul Lamp**, a legendary trinket that will allow you to harness the souls of your enemies for battle.

# What all does this mod add?
This mod adds one item (the soul lamp ofc), when held any mob you kill will add 1 "charge" to the lamp, you can later right click with the lamp to consume a charge and summon a ghost, these ghosts will fight for you, and have a much more aggressive AI then something like wolves, with various targeting modes for even more control.

# Wait ghosts? So cool!
These ghosts have some special properties: 1. They can fly through walls, 2. They are *invisible* to anyone not targeted by them / controlling them, and 3. Mobs they kill can be used to recharge your soul lamp even more.

# Warnings?
While this mod is very much functional, it was never intended to exist, so there is no crafting recipe for the soul lamp, potential balancing issues, and I doubt I'll be adding to it.

# But wait there's more!
The ghosts and soul lamp were both taken from the main mod: [Ancient Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/ancient-trinkets), which is a mod about adding many different trinkets along with a dynamic questing system, so if you like the idea of the soul lamp (or the idea of trinkets / questing in general) then you might want to check it out.

# Why did you make a standalone mod for this trinket?
Because someone wanted it, and it's trivial to cut away the rest of the mod resulting in something standalone like this.
